description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Dated: Wednesday, 11 Elul 1423 Seleucid = 4 September 1112 CE. In which the widower Abū l-Faḍl Shela b. ʿAmram arranges with his bride Mubāraka bt. Shelomo ha-Kohen that she agrees to live with his son in the same apartment and to eat with him at the same table. In the case the son marries, she promises to be like a sister to his future wife. In the case her husband dies, she has no right to live in the house. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.) VMR
description_he: מסמך משפטי בכתב יד חלפון בן מנשה, 4 בספטמבר 1112. אלמן שלה בן עמרם מסכים עם כלתו מוברכה על תנאי מגורים עם בנו.
